summary: Comprehensive testing of EngineOps partner MCP integrations completed successfully. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend displays all 5 partner cards, 8-step pipelines, ONE-CLICK DEMO button, GitHub Token toggle, partner badges, and Gearsec policy check results correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Button only visible for completed pipeline runs - current display shows most recent (failed) run triggered by demo re-trigger
integration_issues.note: Working as designed - shows for completed runs only

passed_tests: GET /api/partner-status returns all 5 partners (unsiloed, safedep, s2, gearsec, concierge)
POST /api/mcp returns MCP server info with 3 tools
GET /api/projects lists projects including demo project
Bugfix pipeline has 8 steps (Unsiloed Parser, Log Parser, Patch Generator, Sandbox Tester, Selector, Gearsec MCP, Merger, Concierge)
Docs pipeline has 8 steps (Unsiloed Parser, Code Reader, RAG Writer, Editor, Safedep MCP, Compiler, Deployer, Concierge)
GET /api/pipeline-runs/{run_id}/audit-trail returns S2.dev audit records (16 records)
Dashboard shows partner integrations bar with 5 partner cards
Dashboard shows GitHub Token toggle button
Project page shows 8-step pipeline visualization with correct step names
Project page shows partner badges (Unsiloed, Gearsec policy, S2 audit trail, Concierge)
Bugfix tab shows Gearsec policy check result with PASSED status
Bugfix result shows 3 generated patches with confidence percentages
Bugfix result shows Root Cause Analysis section
critical_code_review_comments: Gearsec and Concierge APIs are MOCKED (using local implementations as placeholder until real API keys provided)
GitHub API rate limiting may cause demo pipeline failures - consider adding retry logic or better error messaging
seed_data_creation: Demo project (id: 54b01f81-6ff5-4d9e-a9e8-a7d8c0e1fc5b) with completed bugfix pipeline run (id: e5f22790-9f5b-4237-a82d-06c0b5ea0bb1) was pre-created
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 partner integrations (Unsiloed, Safedep, S2.dev, Gearsec, Concierge) are working. Gearsec and Concierge use MOCKED local implementations. S2.dev audit trail works with 16 records logged. Demo project pipeline runs may fail due to GitHub API rate limiting without a token.
